subject: Concerns Regarding Stakeholder Engagement
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out regarding our ongoing engagement with Meridian Logistics, particularly concerning our primary contact. Over the past few months, I've noticed a significant decrease in responsiveness and engagement from our champion contact, which has raised some concerns about our collaboration moving forward.

Currently, communication has been routed through a less-engaged proxy, which has made it challenging to address key issues and maintain the momentum we had established. I believe it is crucial for us to re-establish direct communication with our primary contact to ensure that we are aligned on our objectives and can effectively support Meridian Logistics' needs.

I would appreciate your thoughts on how we might facilitate a reconnection with our champion contact. Perhaps we could schedule a meeting to discuss this further and explore potential strategies to enhance our engagement.
